{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603221952280B1172BE544534B6F0A0\"}"},"total":51},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429727535301280574","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先想法挺不错，逻辑也比较严谨，可以说，作者是下功夫去构思了，但是！文笔真的可以再提升提升！还有就是人物的对话太尬了，关于标点符号的使用，建议可以再学习一下！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729872042,"group_id":"7396632886532639806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0M8LqM0Xh/T5DFEE05sFLQO+tC1WPXsvEeavlLghTuH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a67faa4cf8bb4c8f99790bec2eb538de~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776704458\u0026x-signature=XJyRCVGTYsfOvAHYMzZtR58H2TA%3D","user_id":"3565029166686284","user_name":"青熙芜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3565029166686284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"vip\",\"title_id\":\"vip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396632886532639806","book_info":{"abstract":"最严谨的龙珠战力体系，严格遵守战力10%以内为势均力敌，持久战；10%-20%有明显差距，但还能维持，主角有机会爆表，以弱胜强；超过20%就是碾压局，完全无还手之力，怎么打都是被揍，基本没有赢的希望；超过30%为秒杀，几秒内解决战斗。另外，这里没有神不能被战力表示一说，神的能量也是一种增幅，5000-10000倍之间浮动，有属性的更高。当然，因为主角是穿越者，所以，这里超四和超赛神都会出现，超四是常态4000倍，超四全功率是常态8000倍，超四全功率是常态20000倍。且会出现超四神，超四神并不是界限突破，界限突破不需要神的气息。普通状态超四神就是超赛神的4000倍，是超蓝80倍，就跟普通超四和超级赛亚人差距一样。也只有这样，超四神才能跨越不断被加强的比鲁斯的力量鸿沟。超四之后的变身有超赛5，白神等，另外，自在极意功同样有增幅倍数，是100倍，自在极意兆是10倍。孙悟空的超蓝界王拳，必须要削弱，因为不削弱换乱战力，因为深蓝贝吉塔就比20超蓝界王拳强，深蓝贝吉塔最多超二神的实力，所以，孙悟空的超蓝界王拳只是相对于常态来说，20倍界王拳等于70倍超赛神的增幅。像这样，后面补充......。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d92291d09917e85bff3d81a8c8be7ea3","author":"大夏少康","author_id":"","book_id":"7396632886532639806","book_name":"龙珠之最强赛亚人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#401010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1297人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":39,\"name\":\"二次元\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39\u0026name=二次元\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":376,\"name\":\"龙珠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376\u0026name=龙珠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":538,\"name\":\"同人\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538\u0026name=同人\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7396632890622100030","read_count":"1297","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"563440"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"253","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,龙珠,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ocd5d0a9eb03f74c11dcedbd03e9c04e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779364348\u0026x-signature=xDZi%2FbgJ%2B0coscHQEIWqO3FeAaU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2410588734235784","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603221952280B1172BE544534B6F0A0\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3227},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1733275194,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7422736143766995737","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，挺不错的书。我比较喜欢的类型。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728258117,"group_id":"7396632886532639806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5r+qY/qRmw23eDwBIQdlwI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110826126866","user_name":"翼天谷的龙眸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110826126866","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":
